'''Desh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] who controlled [[Gandrossi VI]], located in the [[Perinn sector/Legends|Perinn sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
After losing a large sum of credits in a game of [[sakresh]] to the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Ulicx Vinaq]], Desh issued a warrant for the Devaronian's arrest, claiming that the merchant had stolen weapons from Desh's armory.

{{Char-stub}}
